command:
cd /Users/ysingh/PycharmProjects/Capstone-v0.1
source .venv/bin/activate

echo "=== Running existing tests ==="
python3 -m pytest harness/tests/ -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -30

cd /Users/ysingh/PycharmProjects/Capstone-v0.1
source .venv/bin/activate
pip install pytest -q && python3 -m pytest harness/tests/ -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -40

cd /Users/ysingh/PycharmProjects/Capstone-v0.1
ls .venv/bin/ | grep -E "python|pip|pytest" | head -10
PYTHON=$(ls .venv/bin/python3* | head -1)
echo "Python: $PYTHON"

cd /Users/ysingh/PycharmProjects/Capstone-v0.1
.venv/bin/pip3 install pytest -q 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "---"
.venv/bin/python3 -m pytest harness/tests/ -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -40
